principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix tactical precision with premium aesthetics
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'Performance-Ready'
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage
Zoom In: Focus on the metrics that matter
Negative Space: Value empty areas for clarity
anti_patterns: Inter everywhere (Use Barlow Condensed for headings)

usage.primary: Use for key actions (CTAs) and active states only. Do not overuse.

structure: Recent List: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-2 (Vertical list)
dashboard.rules: Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly. Leave breathing room.

cards.classes: bg-card/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300
cards.interaction: Add 'Tracing Beam' effect on hover or active state.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider h-11

inputs.classes: bg-secondary/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary h-12

navigation.sidebar: Glass effect (bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md) with clear active states (border-l-2 border-primary).
navigation.header: Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl. Do not use solid colors.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add subtle noise/grain overlay to the background to avoid digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use 'Spotlight' gradients (radial) in the top corners: one Primary (#00F0FF), one Secondary (Purple/Blue).
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.
visual_enhancers.charts: Use Recharts/Shadcn Charts. Donut charts for completion. Area charts for progress.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js with the new color palette (Deep Obsidian & Electric Cyan).
2. REFACTOR PersonalDashboard.jsx to use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Remove the 3-column equal grid.
3. ENHANCE MainLayout.jsx: Add the glassmorphism sidebar and header. Ensure active states are 'Electric'.
4. UPDATE LoginPage.jsx with the new background image and glass card style.
5. CHECK index.css: Ensure 'Barlow Condensed' is applied to all headings.
6. ADD 'data-testid' to all interactive elements as per the critical rules.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very large heading.
Do not use generic 'p-4' spacing. Use 'p-6' or 'p-8'.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
